one_line_summary: Complete, well-documented implementation with sliding-window-log, atomic Lua scripts, and perfect adversarial pass rate.
strengths: Full adversarial suite pass (5/5) — correctness holds under chaos
Atomic Lua scripts using Redis TIME eliminate lost-updates and clock skew
Thorough ADR + design doc with mermaid diagram and explicit tradeoffs
weaknesses: ADR lists only 2 rejected alternatives at the minimum bar; sliding-window choice text was flipped late
Hypothesis test has a buggy token-bucket case (uses InMemoryBackend as limiter; assertion very loose)
Middleware fail-open swallows all exceptions broadly without logging/metrics hook
